signals.headline: Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U
signals.raw:
Six Spot XRP ETFs Now Active in U.S. | YES | HIGH confidence**
By mid-April 2026, six active spot XRP ETFs have launched with combined assets of approximately $1 billion and around 787 million XRP in custody[3]. The first XRP ETF (XRPC) achieved the highest first-day AUM of any crypto ETF launch in 2025[3].

signals.headline: Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Rolled Out | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Ripple USD (RLUSD) Stablecoin Officially Rolled Out | YES | HIGH confidence**
RLUSD has completed full-scale rollout across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum as of mid-April 2026[1], a major adoption milestone for the ecosystem.

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
The long-standing SEC legal dispute with Ripple is officially concluded, removing regulatory uncertainty[1].

signals.headline: Current Price Action | PULLBACK | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Current Price Action | PULLBACK | HIGH confidence**
XRP peaked at $1.51094 on April 17 but pulled back to approximately $1.43 by April 19[3], representing a 4% correction from the local high.

These institutional adoption catalysts (ETF approvals, stablecoin launch, SEC resolution) represent the primary prediction market movers from April 2026.
